description: Priority Guard appears to provide Priority Guardian, a backend service for focus- and calendar-related workflows, including Google Calendar integration, focus mode actions, and priority/clarity features. It also exposes an OAuth authorization server for client registration and token issuance.
summary: Priority Guard exposes a documented HTTP API and an MCP server; both require Priority Guardian OAuth 2.0 authorization-code-with-PKCE credentials obtained via its dynamic client registration endpoint.
